name: Apolink
long_description: Apolink is a next-generation data relay network designed to provide real-time, low-latency connectivity for satellites in low Earth orbit. By enabling efficient data aggregation and relay through our hybrid RF-optical inter-satellite link (ISL) architecture, we support scalable and resilient space infrastructure across commercial, federal, and defense applications.
one_liner: 24/7 satellite connectivity in low Earth orbit
